text: Immersed in the bright, orderly space of this exhibition, I feel a sense of curiosity ignite within me. The clean glass and geometric lines invite introspection, while the bold 'R+D' display ahead hints at the endless possibilities of human creativity and innovation. I am both an observer and a participant here, entangled in a dialogue between what is known and what can still be discovered. There is an anticipatory energy, as if knowledge is just waiting to reveal itself to those who pause and ponder.
